aeo_readiness.summary: FutureWay Mechanical has a decent foundation for AEO with clear service offerings and contact information, but lacks depth in content and user engagement features.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and provide fresh content.
Incorporate location-based keywords and phrases to improve local search visibility.
Enhance the website with a blog or resources section to target long-tail keywords and demonstrate expertise.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes basic business information such as contact details and service descriptions, but lacks structured data for Google Business Profile (GBP) optimization.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has the essential information for GBP but needs to improve the structured data and local SEO signals to align with GBP requirements.
critical_issues: No clear NAP (Name, Address, Phone number) consistency across the site.
Lack of localized content and keywords.

nap_citations.summary: The NAP information is present but not consistently formatted or utilized across the website, which can hinder local search performance.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all pages and in the footer.
List the business on local directories and citation sites with accurate NAP details.
Use schema markup to explicitly define NAP information for search engines.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized and conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Voice search and AI-driven search queries due to the absence of structured data and natural language content.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement FAQ schema and add conversational FAQs related to HVAC services.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Create detailed, informative content that answers common HVAC-related questions to establish the website as an authority in the field.

page_title: Heating And Air Repair Services At FutureWay Mechanical
